Title: Walk in the Light
Message: Dear Students, as we begin this new term, I want to remind you that you are called to be lights in this world. Each day presents a fresh opportunity to demonstrate the grace of God through your words, your actions, and your attitude toward others. Let your light shine so brightly that those around you cannot help but ask about the source of your joy and peace. Walk humbly, love deeply, and pursue excellence not for your own glory but for the glory of God.
Scripture: John 8:12 — 'I am the light of the world. Whoever follows me will never walk in darkness, but will have the light of life.'
